case_title: TYRONE BORRERO VS. CAREY WONG et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR BARRY III, NELSON CLYDE AS ATTORNEY FOR BORRERO, TYRONE
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-15-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-29-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-15-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-31-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-12-2011 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-12-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AND DISSOLVED. (610) PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)
